instruction: Summarize the laws of thermodynamics.

7 tapaimle aphno utkrrishta kama garirahanubhaeko cha bhani sunishchita garna tapaim kuna prakriya prayoga garnuhuncha?
8 ke ​​tapai vibhinna prakaraka karya vatavaranama anukulana garna sahaja hunuhuncha?

priya [nama],

[kampani nama]

instruction: Create a poem that summarizes the importance of biodiversity
output:
jaivika vividhata, jivanako jala
sabaibhanda sano biruva dekhi shaktishali janavaraharu samma
sabai eka arkasanga jodieka, tepestri phresa
jaba yasaka dhagoharu gadabada hunchan, taba dhikkara badhcha

jivana prrithviko vishala vividhatama nirbhara gardacha
prakrritima santulana kayama rakhnuparcha
sabai praniharu ra hava, pani, matole hamilai tikaunchan
tiniharu bina, hamro bhavishya pakkai dhvasta hunecha

suruma, haniharu halka va nadekhine huna sakcha
tara chandai yo kathora hunecha, ra jivana uthalaputhala hunecha
hamro ajako aj~nanata va udasinata
rahata napae hamro bholi nashta hunecha

hamro samsarako surakshama, aba sangai aunuhos
kinabhane jaivika vividhata jivanako samrakshaka ho
yasako mahatvalai kahile pani kama garna mildaina
hami banchnako lagi yo matra asha ho|

instruction: Describe the monetary policy of the Bank of England
output:
baimka apha i~ngalyandako maudrika niti maudrika (mani apurti) ra vittiya sthirata sunishchita garnaka lagi parishadka nirnayaharu ra byaja daraharu prayoga garnama kendrita cha, sathai arthika vrriddhilai samarthana garna| prathamika upakarana yuke arthavyavasthako adhara byaja dara parivartana gardaicha, juna baimka apha i~ngalyandabata rrina line mulya ho| kama byaja daraharule baimkaharulai upabhoktaharu ra vyavasayaharulai thapa rrina dina protsahita garera arthatantralai uttejita garcha, jabaki uchcha byaja darale udharolai mahango banaera maga ghatauncha|

byajadara toknaka sathai baimka apha i~ngalyandale ‘kvantitetibha iji~na’ karyakrama pani lagu garcha| arthatantrama parichalita mudrako kula rakama badhauna baimkale nayan paisa sirjana garne gareko cha| nayan paisale baimkaharulai thapa rrina dina protsahita garcha ra arthika vrriddhilai pani baliyo banauncha| mudra apurti badhaera mudrasphiti niyantrana gari mulya sthira rakhne baimkako lakshya raheko cha |

antatah, baimka apha i~ngalyandako maudrika niti arthavyavastha sthira ra badhdo rakhna dijaina garieko ho| yo uchita starako byaja dara seta garera ra mudra apurtile mudrasphiti nimtyaundaina bhanne sunishchita garna vibhinna upayaharu lagu garera prapta huncha|

instruction: Share a recipe for making apple pie.
output:
samagri:
3 kapa sabai-uddeshya ata
1/2 chammacha namaka
3/4 kapa tarakari choto
2 chammacha seto chini
7 chammacha barpha chiso pani
6-7 tarta syau, chilieko ra katieko
1/4 kapa seto chini
1/4 chammacha jayaphala
1/4 chammacha jamina dalachini
1 chammacha taja nichorieko kagatiko rasa
2 chammacha paglieko makkhana

dishaharu:
1 obhanalai 425 digri pharenahaita (220 digri selsiyasa) ma purva tataunuhos|
2 eka madhyama katorama, pitho ra nuna sangai milaunuhos| eka pestri katara va 2 chakku prayoga garnuhos jaba samma mishrana moto makaiko mildo nadekhiesamma chotakarima katnuhos|
3 chinima halachala|
4 kachaurama 4 chamcha chiso pani charknuhos ra kantako satha halka rupama milaunuhos|
5 eka patakama 1 chammacha pani thapnuhos jabasamma sabai pitho osilo hundaina ra mishranale bala banauncha|
6 atalai 2 balaharuma vibhajana garnuhos, pratyekalai diskama samatala garnuhos, momako kagajama bernuhos, ra kamtima 1 ghantako lagi chiso garnuhos|
7 ata chiso bhaepachi, 1 diskalai halka pitho bhaeko satahama lagabhaga 1/4 incha baklo banaunuhos| 9 incha pai pletako talama rakhnuhos ra drridha rupama thichnuhos|
8 euta thulo katorama katieko syau rakhnuhos| chini, jayaphala, dalachini, ra kagatiko rasa thapnuhos; syau samana rupama lepita nabhaesamma halachala| bekda pai shelama chammacha mishrana|
9 syauko shirshama makkhanako sano thoplaharu rakhnuhos|
10 atako anya diska rola auta garnuhos ra bharna mathi rakhnuhos| krastaka kinaraharulai aumlaharudvara pincha garnuhos| eka kanta samga krima garnuhos|
11 425 digri pharenahaita (220 digri selsiyasa) ma 35 dekhi 40 minetako lagi beka garnuhos, va krasta sunaulo khairo nabhaesamma| seva garnu aghi chiso huna dinuhos|

instruction: Write a lesson plan to teach basic coding.

patha yojana: adharabhuta kodi~nako parichaya

uddeshya: yasa pathako antyama, vidyarthiharule kodi~na ra vastavika-jivana anuprayogaharu bichako sambandhalai vishleshana garna, karyakramaharuko bhumika bujhna, ra euta sarala kodi~na karyakrama sirjana garna sakshama hunechan|

prakriya:
1 kodi~na ra karyakrama ko avadharana ko parichaya|
2 kodi~na ra vastavika jivana anuprayogaharu bichako sambandhako barema kura garnuhos|
3 kodi~na ra yasako prayogaharuko udaharanaharu pradana garnuhos|
4 karyakramaharuko samrachanabare chalaphala garnuhos|
5 vidyarthiharulai uniharuko patha sampadakama parichaya garaunuhos ra uniharulai aphnai adharabhuta karyakrama banauna lagaunuhos|
6 vidyarthiharulai kagajako thulo tukrama aphna kodaharu lekhna lagaunuhos|
7 kodi~na prakriyako barema chalaphalako netrritva garnuhos ra vidyarthiharulai aphna anubhavaharu sajha garna lagaunuhos|
8 avashyakata anusara vidyarthiharulai aphna karyakramaharu dibaga garna lagaunuhos|
9 vidyarthika karyakramaharuma pratikriya dinuhos|
10 pathalai sametnuhos ra mukhya bundaharulai samkshepa garnuhos|

instruction: malai gaira-manava janavaraharuko samuhako udaharana dinuhos juna samajika vyavaharaharu sikna sakshama chan|

anya udaharanaharuma aphriki jamgali biraloharu samavesha chan, jo samuhama baschan ra ekaarkasanga sahayoga garna sikchan, ra aphriki gre totaharu, juna vastavama manisaharule sikaeko samajika vyavaharaharu bujhna sakshama huna janincha| gappi, stikalabyaka ra molijasta macha prajatiharule pani samajika vyavahara sikne samketaharu dekhaunchan| antama, mauriharuko jatila samajika vyavaharako karanale vyapaka rupama adhyayana garieko cha| tiniharu eka-arkasanga kurakani garna aphnai advitiya bhasha banauna sakshama chan, ra pustaharu marphata janakari pani pasa garna sakchan| tyasta kshamataharule robotiksama yasa j~nanako anuprayogaharuma anusandhana garna netrritva gareko cha|

instruction: vij~nana-katha samsarama sahasika karyako barema euta katha utpanna garnuhos|
output: jona prrithvika eka vaij~nanika thie jasale eka aj~nata vij~nana-katha samsarako khoji gareka thie| jaba usale anautho ra aparichita paridrrishyako madhyamabata aphno bato banayo, usale desha bhari basne anautho ra advitiya praniharu dekhe| ghantaumko khoji pachi, unale purano parityaga mahala bhete| unale mahala patta lagaune nirnaya gare ra chandai nai usale nayan samsarama jane euta gopya portala patta lagae| portala sakriya garepachi, ujyalo ujyalo chamkiyo ra unale aphulai achammale bharieko nayan samsarama bhettae| usale yo nayan samsara anveshana garna chahanthyo tara portala achanaka gayaba bhayo| jona aba yo nayan samsarama adkieko thiyo, tara sahasika bhavanako satha unale yo samsarama bhaeka sabai rahasyaharu patta lagauna ra khulasa garna thale|

instruction: Create a short piece of fiction that features a dialogue between two characters about the future of the Internet
output:
jona ra sarale aphno nayan dijaina garieko grriha karyalayama basda intaranetako bhavishyabare chalaphala gariraheka thie|

"malai lagcha ki yo dherai anukulana yogya hunecha", jonale bhane| "hami hamro vebapejaharuko rupa ra anubhutilai prabhava parna sakshama hunechaum ra tiniharulai hamro svada ra chasoharu anurupa banauna sakshama hunechaum|"

"yo sanchchai ramro cha," sarale bhanin, unako ankha utsahale chauda bhayo| "malai lagcha ki sambhavanaharu ananta chan - ma kalpana garna pani sakdina ki bhavishyale hamro lagi ke rakhcha| ma ke huna sakcha bhanera dherai utsahita chu|"

jona muskurae| "malai pani| hamisanga ajhai pani hamra manaparne vebasaitaharu hunechan, kinabhane manisaharu sadhaim jadana rahana avashyaka hunecha| tara intaraneta kevala manisaharusanga jodine kura hoina - yo manora~njana, kinamela, shiksha, ra thapako lagi prayoga garna sakincha| hamile intaraneta hamro janakari ra j~nanako prathamika srota bhaeko pani patta lagauna sakchaun|"

sarale tauko hallain, sapana dekhi| "ma pakka chu ki yo adbhuta hunecha|"

jona ra sarale aphno utsahalai sambodhana garna sakenan, dubai nishchita chan ki bhavishya avishvasaniya avasaraharule bharieko cha|

instruction: Research the most common ethical issues related to data collection.
output: data sa~nkalanasanga sambandhita sabaibhanda samanya naitika muddaharu madhye eka bhaneko manisaharuko j~nana va sahamati bina data prayoga hune jokhima ho| data analaina tryaki~na upakaranaharu, kukiharu, analaina sarvekshanaharu, va anya madhyamaharu marphata sahamati bina prapta garna sakincha| anumati bina sa~nkalana data svachalita nirnaya garna prayoga garna sakincha, jastai kredita skori~na va jagira avedana, va eka nishchita ejenda seva garna heraphera| thapa rupama, manisaharuko deta lika va tiniharuko janakari bina bechna sakincha, sambhavita suraksha jokhima va vittiya hani nimtyauna sakcha| data sa~nkalanama bhedabhava va purvagrahako sambhavana pani cha yadi kampaniharule deta prapta va prayoga garne tarikaharu juna nishpaksha va samana chaina| antama, data sa~nkalanale vyaktiko gopaniyatama pratikula prabhava parna sakcha, kinaki kampaniharule eka vyaktiko barema thulo matrama data sa~nkalana ra bhandarana garna sakshama hunchan juna uniharuko avashyakata va chahanasanga sandarbhika nahuna sakcha|

instruction: Create a 3-minute speech on why a college degree is important.
output:
sabailai shubhaprabhata| aja, ma yahan tapaimsanga sajhedari garna aeko chu kina kaleja digri pachyauna yati mahattvapurna cha|

pahilo ra pramukha, kalejale thapa kyariyara avasaraharuko dhoka kholcha| dherai rojagaradataharulai jagirako lagi yogya huna kamtima kaleja digri chahincha| kalejako digrile dekhauncha ki tapaimle vibhinna prakaraka janakariharu siknubhaeko cha, bauddhika kshamata cha, ra j~nanako vishishta kshetrako adhyayanako lagi jimmevari lina saknuhuncha| yasale tapaimlai tyo padonnati prapta garna sakcha, tapaimko rojagarika avasaraharu badhauna sakcha ra tapaimlai dirghakalina rupama thapa rojagari yogya banauna sakcha|

dosro, kaleja digriharule uchcha talabako sambhavana pradana gardacha| adhyayanaharule dekhaeko cha ki kaleja snatakaharule kevala hai skula diploma bhaekaharu bhanda ullekhaniya rupama badhi kamaunchan| kalejako digri paera, snatakaharu rojagaradataharuka lagi thapa akarshaka hunchan, jasale uchcha talaba va ajha ramro tirne kamama netrritva gardacha|

antama, kaleja digrile jivanabhara sikne dhoka kholna sakcha| kalejale nirantara sikaiko lagi thulo adhara pradana gardacha ra vyaktigata vikasalai protsahita gardacha| ajako pravidhiko satha, sikne ra nayan j~nana prapta garna jari rakhna pahile bhanda sajilo cha|

antama, kalejako digri pachyaunda dherai phaidaharu chan, adhika kyariyara avasaraharu, uchcha talabaharu, ra sikne jivanabhara| sunidiekoma dhanyabada|

instruction: Give an example of a browser compatibility issue in web design.

instruction: globala varmi~naka karana hune samasyaharuma nibandha sirjana garnuhos
output:
globala varmi~na hamro samayako sabaibhanda mahattvapurna muddaharu madhye eka bhaeko cha| yasale samundri sataha badhnedekhi charama mausami ghatanaharu sammaka vibhinna samasyaharu nimtyairaheko cha| yi samasyaharule manisaharu ra vatavarana duvaima vinashakari prabhava parna sakcha|

jalavayu parivartanale prrithviko ausata tapakrama badheko cha, jasale garda samudrako sataha badheko cha ra tatiya kshetrama badhi aeko cha| yasale lakhaumko jivanalai khatarama pareko cha ra dherailai visthapita gareko cha, sathai mahattvapurna basasthana ra ikosistamalai hani pur{}yaeko cha| anya charama mausami ghatanaharu, jastai vinashakari khaderi, globala varmimgako karanale pani badhiraheko cha| yasale krrishi utpadanama gambhira asara parna sakcha, khadya surakshalai khatarama parna sakcha ra dherailai banchne sadhanaharu bina chodna sakcha|

globala varmi~na pani vayu pradushanama pratyaksha yogadanakarta ho, kinaki badhdo tapakramale thapa pradushakaharu niskancha| yasale manava svasthyama khataranaka prabhava parna sakcha, shvasaprashvasa samasya ra anya rogaharu nimtyauna sakcha| thapa rupama, globala varmi~nale samudri dharaharu parivartana garna sakcha, basainsara dhanchama badha pur{}yauncha, ra rogako phailavata pani badhauna sakcha|

yi ta globala varmi~naka karana hune dherai samasyaharu matra hun| yo spashta cha ki hamile samasyalai sambodhana garna ra utsarjana kama garna ra jalavayu parivartanako prabhavalai kama garna kama garna avashyaka cha| saubhagyavasha, tyahan vyaktigata karyaharudekhi sarakari nitiharu sammaka dherai avasaraharu chan| globala varmi~nalai thapa vinasha sirjana garnabata rokne ra karabahi garnu hamro dayitva ho|

instruction: Compare and contrast the rise of the Soviet Union and the fall of the Iron Curtain.

sobhiyata samghako udaya ra phalamako pardako patanale bisaum shatabdiko bhurajanitika paridrrishyama dui pramukha parivartanaharu pratinidhitva gardacha|

sobhiyata samghako udaya san 1917 ma aktobara kranti ra sobhiyata rajyako sthapanasangai suru bhayo| aktobara krantile jaravadi niramkushatalai parajita garyo, sobhiyata samghama marksavadi-leninavadi shasanako lamo avadhiko lagi charana seta garyo| yasa samayama sobhiyata sarakarale dherai rajya prayojita samajika ra arthika karyakramaharu lagu gar{}yo, sobhiyata samghako rajanitika, arthika ra samajika pranalima amula parivartana lyayo|

phalamako pardako patana 1980 ko dashakako antama suru bhayo, sobhiyata samghako patana ra 1989 ma varsa samjhautako vighatana samga| yo ghatanale shita yuddhako antya ra antarrashtriya vyavasthama eka kattarapanthi parivartanalai chinha lagaiyo| yasale purvi yuropama sobhiyata varchasvako antyalai samketa garyo, ra yasako sathama shita yuddhako samayama purva ra pashchima bichako vaicharika ra bhautika vibhajanako antya bhayo|

sobhiyata samghako udayale antarrashtriya vyavasthama thulo parivartana lyaeko ra airana pardako patanale shitayuddhako nirnayaka antya ra nayan yugama samkramanako pratinidhitva gardai yi dui ghatanaharule vishvavyapi bhurajanitika santulanama mahattvapurna prabhava pareko thiyo| antarrashtriya sambandhako|

instruction: pravidhiko samajika prabhavako vishleshana garne nibandha lekhnuhos|
output:
pravidhile hamro samajama gahiro prabhava pareko cha| yasale hamile kama garne tarika, hami kasari sa~nchara garchaum ra hami kasari manora~njana garchaum bhanne kurama krantikari parivartana lyaeko cha| teknolojima bhaeko pragatile j~nana ra suchanako pahunchalai sahaja ra suvidhajanaka banaeko cha, jasale garda kunai bela suchanama simita pahuncha thiyo| teknolojile hamilai eka batanako kehi klikama samsarabharaka manisaharusanga jodina sakshama banaera ekasatha najika lyaeko cha|

ekai samayama, teknolojile kehi nakaratmaka prabhava pareko cha| pravidhiko badhdo prayogale samajika alagava ra vastavikatabata vichcheda bhaeko cha| manisaharule arusanga amanesamane kurakani garna avashyaka chaina, jasale samajika antarakriyalai kamajora pareko cha ra vastavika kurakanilai rokeko cha| thapa rupama, pravidhiko vikasa hundai janda, vyaktiharulai sadhaim parivartanashila pravidhiko satha rahana ra rojagara bajarama pratispardhi rahana gahro hundai gairaheko cha|

pravidhile samajama sakaratmaka ra nakaratmaka duvai prabhava pareko cha | jimmevara ra niyamana garieko prayogako satha, pravidhile hamilai ajha ramro, thapa jodieko jivana banchna maddata garna sakcha| taipani, yo sunishchita garna mahattvapurna cha ki teknolojima hamro nirbharatale vastavikatabata vichcheda huna nadine|

instruction: Summarize the events in Act 1 of Hamlet.

instruction: Generate a transcript for a 5-minute podcast with the given prompt.
output:
vegan diaries ko pachillo episodama svagata cha! aja, hami shakaharivadako badhdo lokapriyata ra grahako bhavishyako lagi yasako artha ke ho bhanera khojiraheka chaum|

halaka varshaharuma shakaharivada badhdo rupama lokapriya bhaekoma kunai shamka chaina| ethalitaharudekhi selibretiharu ra dainika manisaharusamma, manisaharule naitika, digo ra svastha jivanashaili chanautako rupama shakaharivadama pharkane pravrritti badhdai gaeko cha|

tyasobhae kina shakaharivada yati lokapriya hundaicha? euta karana yasako svasthya labha huna sakcha| biruvama adharita aharaharu prayah nishchita svasthya avasthaharuko kama jokhimasanga jodieko huncha| thapa rupama, shakaharivadalai dheraile naitika jivanashaili chanautako rupama herchan jasale janavaraharuko adhikaralai samarthana gardacha ra vyaktiko vatavaraniya padachihnalai kama gardacha|

shakaharivadalai dherai bhanda dherai vyaktiharule matra apanairaheko chaina, tara yo vyavasayaharu bichako lokapriyatama pani badhiraheko cha| vibhinna udyogaharuka kampaniharule shakahari kapada ra saundarya prasadhanadekhi shakahari resturentaharu ra khadya vastuharuma shakahari vikalpaharu prastava gariraheka chan| yasale kampaniharu bicha pratispardha sirjana gardaicha ra tiniharulai utkrrishta shakahari utpadanaharu sirjana garna dhakeliraheko cha|

shakaharivadako bhavishya ke huncha? yo batauna gahro cha, tara euta kura nishchita cha: shakaharivada chandai hatne chaina| naitika ra vatavaraniya phaidaharu ajha spashta hundaichan ra manisaharule dhyana diiraheka chan| kampaniharule adhika shakahari utpadanaharu utpadana gardai, yasto dekhincha ki shakaharivada vishvavyapi lokapriyatama matra badhnecha|

kajikale aparichita bhubhagama nebhigeta garna maddata garnako lagi jamgalako aphno j~nana prayoga garera, ra bhari vastuharu bokna sakne aphno shakti prayoga garera sahayogako prastava gare| badalama, gaunleharule unalai khana ra upahara die| samaya bitdai janda kajika ra gaunlebichako mitrata gadha hundai gayo ra unako pratishtha phailina thalyo| tadha-tadhabata manisaharu maddata magna kajikakahan ae, ra uhanle tiniharulai kahilyai inkara garnubhaena|

kajika gaunma eka phikschara baneka thie, gaunleharulai suraksha ra margadarshana pradana gardai| tiniharule uhanlai ra uhanko buddhiko adara gare, ra kajikalai tyasabeladekhi nai vanako rakshakako rupama chininthyo|

instruction: google ko robotiksa ko tina niyama ko uddeshya ko samkshepa
output: google ko robotiksa ko tina niyamaharu lai sunishchita garna ko lagi dijaina garieko cha ki robota ra ai le surakshita ra naitika vyavahara gardacha| kanunaharu aijyaka asimobhako robotiksaka tina niyamaharuma adharita chan, jasama bhanieko cha: 1) robotale manavalai chota pur{}yauna sakdaina va, nishkriyata marphata, manavalai hani garna anumati dincha; 2) robotale manavajatile dieko adeshako palana garnai parcha baheka tyasta adeshaharu pahilo kanunasanga bajhine; ra 3) robotale aphno astitvako raksha garnuparcha jabasamma yasto suraksha pahilo va dosro kanunasanga bajhieko chaina| gugalaka tina niyamaharu thorai pharaka chan ra yaso bhanchan: 1) robotale hani garnu hundaina, va nishkriyatale manavalai hani pur{}yaunu hundaina; 2) robotale upayukta manavaharuko aj~na palana garnuparcha, jabasamma tyasta adeshaharu pahilo kanunasanga bajhine chainan; ra 3) robotale aphno astitvako raksha garnuparcha, jabasamma yasto suraksha pahilo va dosro kanunasanga bajhieko chaina| samuhika rupama, yi kanunaharule manisaharulai hani nagari va upayukta vyaktiharuko adeshako avaj~na nagari robota ra eai surakshita ra naitika rupama prayoga garincha bhani sunishchita garnaka lagi ho|

peshevaraharusanga suru garaum| eka antarakriyatmaka prastuti vidyarthiharuko lagi borimga vyakhyana bhanda dherai akarshaka huna sakcha| yasale tiniharulai tiniharuko sitabata bahira nikalcha ra tiniharulai sikne prakriyako hissa banna anumati dincha| vidyarthiharule ajha sajilaisanga sahakarya garna sakchan ra samagrilai drrishya rupama prastuta garda ajha sajilai bujhna sakchan| antarkriyatmaka prastutikaranaharu pani sajilaisanga anukulana garna sakincha ra udanama parivartana garna sakincha, jaba yo shikshanako kura auncha thapa lachakata pradana gardai|

aba, vipaksha| antarakriyatmaka prastutikaranaharulai dherai tayari chahincha, ra shikshakaharulai sahi hunako lagi samaya khapata huna sakcha| yadi ramrari hyandala gariena bhane, antarakriyatmaka prastutima prastuta janakari bhari va avyavasthita huna sakcha| vyaktigata vidyarthiharuko lagi nirdeshana pharaka garna va sikai anubhavalai nijikrrita garna pani gahro huna sakcha| thapa rupama, antarakriyatmaka prastutikaranaharu kehi paristhitiharuma prastuta garna gahro huna sakcha, jastai kolahala va bhidabhada kothaharuma|

samagrama, antarakriyatmaka prastutikaranaharuma kakshakothama akarshaka ra prabhavakari upakarana hune sambhavana huncha, uniharulai saphala hunako lagi savadhanipurvaka vichara ra yojana pani chahincha| antarakriyatmaka prastutikaranaharu kama garna avashyaka kama ra prayasama rakhna ichchuka vyaktiharuko lagi, puraskaraharule uniharulai prayasako layaka banauna sakcha|

5 graundeda rahanuhos: graundi~na pravidhiharu prayoga garnuhos, jastai gahiro sasa pherna ra pragatishila mamsapeshi vishrama, vartamana kshanama aphulai kendrita garna maddata garna|
6 arusanga kura garnuhos: tapaimle vishvasa garnuhune ra bharosa garne vyaktiharusanga kura garda tapaimle aphno samajika chinta eklai samana garirahanubhaeko chaina bhanera samjhauna maddata garna sakcha ra samarthana ra sallaha dina saknuhuncha|
7 samparkama rahanuhos: bharchuala hya~ngaautaharu ra lekhne jasta gatividhiharu marphata anya manisaharusanga jadana garda eklopana ra aparyaptatako bhavanaharu viruddha ladna maddata garna sakcha|
8 atma-herachaha abhyasa garnuhos: aphno lagi samaya linuhos ra gatividhiharuma samlagna hunuhos jasale tapaimko mudalai utthana dincha ra tapaimlai uddeshyako bhavana dincha|
9 vyavasayika maddata khojnuhos: yadi tapaimko samajika chinta sahana gahro bhaeko cha bhane, eka chikitsaka va yogya manasika svasthya pradayakabata vyavasayika maddata khojna nahichakichaunuhos|
10 dayalu chanauta garnuhos: aphulai kathora ra kathora vyavahara garnuko satta, namra hunuhos ra aphulai samana prakarako karuna dekhaunuhos juna tapaimle arko vyaktilai dekhaunuhuncha|

instruction: adhunika saphtaveyara vikasama saphtaveyara injiniyari~na dijaina siddhantaharu lagu garne mahattvako vyakhya garnuhos|
output:
saphtaveyara injiniyari~na dijaina siddhantaharu adhunika samayama saphala saphtaveyara vikasako lagi mahatvapurna chan| yi siddhantaharu sabai saphtaveyara pariyojanaharuma uchcha starako skelebiliti, vishvasaniyata, upayogita, ra rakharakhava yogyata prapta garna prayoga garna sakincha| saphtaveyara injiniyari~na dijainama utkrrishta abhyasaharu lagu garera, vikasakartaharule paisa bachata garna, dakshata badhauna ra gunastariya saphtaveyara chito utpadana garna sakchan|

dijaina siddhantaharule vikasakartaharulai thapa prabhavakari arkitekcharaharu, kushala elgoridamaharu, ra thapa padhna yogya, marmata yogya koda dijaina garna anumati dincha| thapa rupama, amurtata, modulariti, ra ekstensibiliti jasta dijaina siddhantaharule jatilata kama garna ra vikasakartaharulai suvidhaharu thapna, bagaharu samadhana garna ra avasthita saphtaveyara apagreda garna sajilo banaundacha| yi siddhantaharu pachyaera, saphtaveyara vikasa toliharule uniharuko saphtaveyara bharapardo cha ra parivartanaharu chito ra sajilai lagu garna sakincha bhanne kura sunishchita garna sakchan|

nishkarshama, adhunika samayama saphala saphtaveyara vikasako lagi saphtaveyara injiniyari~na dijaina siddhantaharu avashyaka chan| tiniharule vikasakartaharulai uchcha-gunastarako saphtaveyara utpadana garna sakshama banaunchan juna bharapardo, marmatayogya ra mapanayogya cha|

output: vargikaranakartale syau ra suntala alaga garna diieko data prayoga garnecha| yasale pharaka visheshataharuma dhyana kendrita gardacha, jastai ra~na, akara, ra svada, pratyeka vastulai yasako sambandhita kotima sahi rupama tokna| udaharanaka lagi, syau rato ra suntala suntala bhaeko dui phalaharu bichako bhinnatako lagi prayoga garincha| tyasai gari, golakara syau ra suntala bicha eka bhinna visheshata ho, syau golakara ra suntala amdakara chan| antama, syau samanyataya tarta hunchan jabaki suntala samanyataya mitho hunchan, jasale dui phalaharu bichako bhinnatalai arko tarika dincha|

instruction: mudrita akhabaraharu ra analaina samachara autaletaharu tulana garnuhos ra viparita garnuhos|
output: chapieka patrapatrika ra analaina samachara autaletaharuma dherai samanata ra bhinnataharu chan| ekatira, dubai kisimale eutai prakarako samagri pradana gardacha — samachara — eutai prakaraka darshakaharulai| yadyapi, yi dui midiya dhanchaharu bicha mukhya bhinnataharu chan| mudrita samachara patraharu samanyataya dainika delibhara garincha ra riportaraharubata thapa gahana vishleshana prastava gardacha, jabaki analaina samachara autaletaharu vastavika-samayama adyavadhika hunchan ra praya: adhika raya-kendrita hunchan| mudrita samachara patraharu praya: ni:shulka va kama sadasyata shulkako lagi prastava garincha, jabaki analaina samachara autaletaharu ni:shulka, vij~napana-samarthita sa~nchalanaharu hunchan| thapa rupama, mudrita samachara patraharule pharakilo bhaugolika kshetralai pachyaune gardacha, jabaki analaina samachara autaletaharu vishishta kshetraharu, shaharaharu ra vishayaharuma kendrita hunchan|

instruction: kampyutarale aniyamita samkhya kasari utpanna garcha bhanera vyakhya garnuhos|
output: kampyutarale pseudorandom number jenareshana (prng) namaka prakriya marphata aniyamita samkhya utpanna gardacha| yasama euta j~nata samkhya (biuko rupama chinincha) line ra nayan samkhya utpanna garnako lagi yasama ganitiya samikarana lagu garne samavesha cha| yo nambara tyasapachi arko nambarako lagi bijako rupama prayoga garincha, ra yastai| utpanna garieka samkhyaharuko aniyamitata prayoga garieko chadma raimdama nambara janaretara (prng) elgoridamako gunastarama nirbhara gardacha| thapa rupama, sancho aniyamitata bahya srotaharu jastai vayumandaliya avaja, bhautika upakaranaharu (jastai, randomorg), va vebasaitaharubata halai kyapchara garieko deta prayoga garera prapta garna sakincha|

instruction: Come up with an imaginative story about a magical forest.
output:
kunai samayako kura ho, puratana vanako mutuma lumi namaka rahasyamaya jiva basthyo| lumisanga vanako mohita rukha ra botabiruvaharu sirjana garne, akara dine ra heraphera garne shakti thiyo| yasa shaktile, unale jamgalalai achammako saundaryako thaunma rupantarana garna sakthe, vishvasabhanda bahirako prakasha ra ramgaharule bharieko|

hareka dina, lumile aphno jadui jamgalako dhoka kholne gardathyo ra charaitirabata aune agantukaharu yasama raheko bhavyata dekhera chakka parchan| ja~ngalako yatra garda sapanako purano rukha, indreni pula, taraharuko jharana ra nachne pataharuko bato bhettauna sakincha| pratyeka prani, sana pariharudekhi shaktishali dryaganaharu samma, jadui jamgalako nyano amgaloma santvana ra ananda pauna sakthe|

dherailai thaha nabhae pani yo sundara thaun lumiko rahasya thiyo| kinabhane unalai thaha thiyo ki unako jadui jamgalako shaktiharu sabaile thaha pauna nasakne shaktishali chan|

instruction: Modify the given code to print the largest number in the list.
input:
samkhya = [3, 4, 9, 5]

samkhyama samkhyako lagi:
        # nambara barabara cha ki chaina jancha garnuhos
        yadi samkhya % 2 == 0:
                # printa auta nambara
                chapa(samkhya)
output:
samkhya = [3, 4, 9, 5]

# sabaibhanda thulo_num lai -infinity ma asaina garnuhos
big_num = -float('inf')

# samkhyaharuma dohoryaunuhos
samkhyama samkhyako lagi:
    # nambara thulo_samkhya bhanda thulo cha ki chaina jancha garnuhos
    yadi num > large_num:
        # thulo_samkhyama nambara asaina garnuhos
        thulo_samkhya = samkhya

# sabaibhanda thulo_samkhya printa garnuhos
chapnuhos(sabaibhanda thulo samkhya)

instruction: Generate a recipe for black bean tacos
output:
bina ra panira tacos
samagri:
• 1 kalo simina
• 2 chamcha jaitunako tela
• 1 sano pyaja, katieko
• 2 lasuna lasuna, kema
• 1 chamcha khursaniko dhulo
• 1 chamcha jira
• ⅛ chamcha lala mircha
• nuna ra taja kalo mircha
• 8 sana makai va pitho tartila
• ¼ kapa silintro, katieko
• ¼ kapa tukrieko kveso phresko
• adha kapa kateko chija

dishaharu:
1 madhyama tatoma euta skiletama jaitunako tela tataunuhos| pyaja ra lasuna thapnuhos ra narama nabhaesamma pakaunuhos, lagabhaga 2 mineta|
2 binsa, khursani paudara, jira, lala mircha, ra nuna ra svadako lagi kali mircha thapnuhos| 5 minetako lagi kahile kanhi halachala gardai, pakaunuhos|
3 tato skileta va maikrovebhama tartilaharu nyano parnuhos| silantro, panira, ra kveso phreskoko satha mathi tartilaharu bicha bina mishrana vibhajita garnuhos|
4 salsa va aphno manaparne anya toppings samga tacos seva garnuhos| maja linuhos!

instruction: manaum tapaile vyavasthapana padako lagi avedana dinubhaeko cha ra tapailai kina jagira chahanuhuncha bhanera sodhieko cha, tapaile kasto pratikriya dinuhunecha?
input: prashna: tapai kina yo jagira chahanuhuncha?
output: ma yo jagira chahanchu kinabhane malai vishvasa cha ki yasa prakarako kamako lagi mero j~nana, anubhava ra utsahale netrritva toliharu ra sakaratmaka natijaharu draibha garne mero jununasanga milera malai bhumikako lagi utkrrishta banauncha| ma chunautiharubata utprerita chu ra peshevaraharuko atyadhika saphala toliko netrritva garera prabhava parna utsuka chu| mero lakshya saphalataharuma nirmana garnu ra nirantara vrriddhilai draibha garnu ho, jabaki mero tolile vyavasayika ra vyaktigata rupama vikasa garcha bhanne sunishchita gardai|

instruction: Write a letter of appreciation for the given situation.
output:
priya [shikshakako nama],

tapaimle garnubhaeko adbhuta kamako lagi mero imanadara prashamsa vyakta garna ma eka kshana lina chahanchu| mero shiksha ra mero vikasama tapaimko prabhava atulaniya cha| tapai sandhai nayan nirdeshanatmaka vidhiharu ra rachanatmaka gatividhiharu khojna utsuka hunuhuncha jasale malai samagri bujhna ra patta lagauna maddata garyo| tapaim sadhaim kakshama pratyeka vidyarthisanga dhairya rahanuhunthyo ra sabailai saphala hune eutai avasara ho bhani sunishchita garna kada parishrama garnubhayo| tapaile vidyarthiko natijako barema sanchchikai khyala garnubhaeko tarika ra yo preranadayi cha bhanne maile mahasusa garna sakchu| eka anukaraniya shikshaka bhaekoma ra hamro sikaima dherai mulyavana ghantaharu samarpita garnubhaekoma dhanyavada|

hardika krritaj~nata sahita,
[vidyarthiko nama]

instruction: dui stri~nako sabaibhanda lamo sajha sabastri~na phela parna euta prakarya lekhnuhos|
output:
def longest_common_substring(s1, s2):
    # stri~na lambaiharu prarambha garnuhos|
    m = lena(s1)
    n = len(s2)
  
    # sabaibhanda lamo samanya sabastri~na prarambha garnuhos
    parinama = ""
  
    # dui tarako lambaibata suru garnuhos
    # ra dui suchakamka seta garnuhos
    ma dayara (m) ko lagi:
        dayara(n) ma j ko lagi:
  
            # kauntara suru garnuhos
            ganana = 0
  
            # sabaibhanda lamo samanya sabastri~na phela parnuhos
            jabaki (i + ganana < m ra
                   j + ganana < n ra
                   s1[i + ganana] == s2[j + ganana]):
                ganana += 1
  
            # sabaibhanda lamo samanya sabastri~na adyavadhika gardacha
            yadi ganana > lena (natija):
                parinama = s1 [i: i + ganana]
    parinama phirta

instruction: tadhako bhumima jadui yatrako barema euta katha sunaunuhos|
output:
eka pataka, tyahan eka bahadura keta thiyo jo tadha deshama yatra garyo| uni sahasika khojne thaun khojdai thie ra unako sapana samsarama sakaratmaka parivartana garne thiyo| dinako khoji ra anaginti yatraharu pachi, unale ullekhaniya praniharu ra jij~nasu rahasyaharule bharieko jadui thaunma thakkara nadeu~njela unale lagabhaga sabai asha gumae|

hariyali maidana videshi phula ra shanta janavaraharule sajieko thiyo| ketale sapanama chu jasto lagyo ra tyo sabaiko sundaratalai manana garna rokyo| euta rahasyamaya dhu~ngako dhokama naaunjela u varipari himdyo, eka ashcharyabata arkoma uchaldai|

jaba usale yasalai kholyo, u aphno jamgali kalpanabhanda bahirako thaunma bagyo, ithara sundaratako thaun| putaliharu kunabata kunasamma udiraheka thie ra hava jadule bhari thiyo| usale antatah bujhyo ki yo unako sapanako thaun ho, ra u sabai kura anveshana garna ra agadi ke sahasika karyaharu dekhna utsahita thiyo|

jadui bhumi sahasika ra apratyashita ashcharyale bharieko cha bhanera phela parna unale havako phusaphusalai pachyae| yasa rahasyamaya bhumiko rahasyaharu sikdai garda uhanle anautho praniharu samana garnubhayo, shaktishali mamtraharu patta lagaunubhayo ra adbhuta sathiharu banaunubhayo|

bahadura ketako yo tadhako yatra, jadui bhumile usalai ramroko lagi parivartana garyo, ra usalai ghara pharkana ra samsarama pharaka parna avashyaka j~nana ra sahasale susajjita banayo|

instruction: List the advantages of electric cars over conventional petrol cars.
output:
paramparagata petrola karaharu bhanda ilektrika karaharuko phaidaharu samavesha chan:
1 kama utsarjana ra adhika urja dakshata - ilektrika karaharule petrola karaharuko tulanama dherai kama hanikaraka utsarjanaharu utpadana garchan, ra tiniharu adhika urja-kushala hunchan|
2 kama marmata lagata - ilektrika karaharulai kama barambara sarbhisi~na chahincha ra samanyataya kama chalne bhagaharu hunchan, jasako parinamasvarupa samagra marmata lagata kama huncha|
3 kama indhana lagata - vidyutiya karaharulai petrola karaharu bhanda dherai kama indhana chahincha, parinamasvarupa lagata bachata samaya samga|
4 lamo dayaraharu - ilektrika karaharule petrola karaharu bhanda ekala charjama dherai agadi yatra garna sakchan, tiniharulai lamo yatrako lagi adarsha banauncha|
5 shanta sa~nchalana - ilektrika karaharu petrola karaharu bhanda dherai shanta chan, tiniharulai draibha garna thapa ramailo banauncha|

output:
globala varmi~na aja vishvako lagi eka astitvako khatara ho| yo vayumandalama haritagrriha gyasaharuko nirmanako karanale garda vishvavyapi ausata tapakramama vrriddhi huncha, jasako parinamasvarupa jalavayu dhancha, samudri stara ra charama mausama ghatanaharuma parivartana huncha| adhikamsha enthropojenika haritagrriha gyasaharu jivashma indhanaharu jalaune, vana phandani, ra anya manava gatividhiharubata aunchan jasale vatavaranama karbana daiaksaida chodcha|

jivashma indhanaharu globala varmi~nako sabaibhanda thulo yogadana karaka hun| jaba yi indhanaharu jalaincha, tiniharuko bhandarana karbana karbana daiaksaida ra anya pradushakaharuko rupama niskancha, jasale vayumandalama tapalai jalama parcha ra vishvavyapi tapamana badhauncha| yasale thapa eka dushchakrama pur{}yauncha jahan adhika karbana utsarjana huncha ra thapa tapakrama badhcha| dirghakalina enthropojenika prabhavaharu baheka, prakrritika ghatanaharu jastai jvalamukhi visphota ra prrithviko kakshama parivartanaharule tapakrama nimtyauna sakcha, tara yi prakriyaharule dherai lamo samaya lincha ra tyasaile vartamana druta globala varmimgako karanaharu hoinan|

globala varmi~naka prabhavaharu vyapaka chan ra yasale vishvabhara jalavayuma gambhira parivartanaharu lyauna sakcha| udaharanaka lagi, badhdo tapakramale dhruviya baraphaharu paglina sakcha, jasale garda samudrako sataha badhcha ra tatiya kshetraharu dubanama parchan| thapa rupama, charama mausama avasthaharu adhika samanya hunechan, ghataka badhi, khaderi ra anya mausama-sambandhita prakopaharuko parinamasvarupa| ajha chintako kura, globala varmi~nale vatavaranama achanaka ra aparivartaniya parivartanaharu trigara garna sakcha, vishvavyapi jalavayu, arthavyavastha ra manava svasthyama mahattvapurna hanikaraka prabhavaharu| tasartha, globala varmi~nako prabhavalai kama garna vishvavyapi karbana utsarjana kama garna thapa sakriya upayaharu lina avashyaka cha|
